content: Full name is Jane Smith, preferred name Jane
Lives in Seattle, WA, USA (Pacific Time)
Software engineer working on cloud infrastructure and databases
Prefers concise, clear responses with code examples when possible
Enjoys hiking, photography, and reading science fiction on weekends
Uses TypeScript and Python daily, prefers TypeScript for backend services
Working on migrating a legacy MongoDB deployment to DocumentDB
Adopted a golden retriever named Luna in March 2026
